request_payload.exposure_text: Your local emergency services are being overwhelmed by preventable disasters. While we focus on political debates, foreign actors are exploiting our complacency. Last year alone, 37% of civil defense drills failed due to outdated protocols. Our neighbors in [State] saw a 42% increase in preventable casualties because they didn't prioritize preparedness. We can't afford to wait any longer. #CivilDefenseNow #PreparednessSavesLives
